description: Likely selects a target object, region, or abstracted grid and outputs a smaller crop or compressed representation. Removes input color(s) [2, 3, 7, 8]; output colors are a subset of input colors. Primary structural cue: smaller output. Inferred transformation family: crop/extract/select. The rule is likely but may need pixel-level refinement.
arcDslCode:
from dsl import *
from constants import *


def solve_72ca375d(I):
    x1 = objects(I, T, T, T)
    x2 = totuple(x1)
    x3 = rbind(subgrid, I)
    x4 = apply(x3, x2)
    x5 = apply(vmirror, x4)
    x6 = papply(equality, x4, x5)
    x7 = pair(x4, x6)
    x8 = extract(x7, last)
    O = first(x8)
    return O
